description: Implement P0 (Lightweight Retry) and P1 (Context Tiering) - the two most impactful token savings that modify existing files runner.py and context_assembler.py
steps: P0 - Lightweight Retry in runner.py: In the Mode 3 loop, after contract_result.valid is False and the violations contain 'Missing required TRANSITION line' or 'Missing required STATUS line', set a flag retry_lightweight = True on the state or a local variable.

P0 - When the next iteration begins in Mode 3, check if retry_lightweight is True. If so, build a minimal prompt string: 'Your previous output was rejected because it is missing required format lines.
Please output ONLY these two lines now:

STATUS: success
TRANSITION: <condition>

Current node: {node_id}
Valid TRANSITION values: {valid_transitions}'. Use this instead of calling assembler.assemble(). Clear retry_lightweight after use.
P0 - If the lightweight retry also fails (contract violation again), set retry_lightweight = False so the next iteration falls back to full context via assembler.assemble().
P1 - Modify ContextAssembler.assemble() to accept a node_id parameter (optional, default None for backward compat). Extract node_id from the node dict if not passed explicitly.

P1 - Implement tiering logic as a dict mapping section names to allowed node IDs. BOOT.md: ['init'], constitution.md: ['init'], dao.md: ['reflect','evolve'], strategy.md: ['plan','reflect'], output_format.md: all nodes, evolution_history: ['reflect','evolve'], recent_reflections: ['reflect'], node_prompt: all, state_summary: all, current_task: ['code','test','review'], plan: ['plan','code'], workspace_manifest: ['code','test','review'], decisions: ['reflect'].

P1 - Wrap each section loading block in assemble() with a conditional check: only include the section if node_id is in the allowed set (or set is 'all'). Keep backward compat: if node_id is None, include all sections (existing behavior).
P1 - Update runner.py to pass node_id (or let it be extracted from the node dict) when calling assembler.assemble().

Add tests in tests/test_lightweight_retry.py for P0: test that lightweight prompt is generated correctly, test that it uses the right node_id and valid transitions, test fallback to full context on second failure.

Add tests in tests/test_context_tiering.py for P1: test that init node loads BOOT.md and constitution, test that code node does NOT load BOOT.md/constitution/dao/strategy, test that reflect node loads dao and decisions but not BOOT.md, test backward compat (node_id=None loads everything).
Run full test suite: python3.12 -m pytest tests/ --cov --cov-fail-under=90 -q
acceptance_criteria: When contract validation fails with missing TRANSITION/STATUS, next iteration uses lightweight prompt instead of full context
If lightweight retry also fails, third attempt uses full context (assembler.assemble)
ContextAssembler.assemble() with node_id='code' does NOT include BOOT.md, constitution.md, dao.md, strategy.md, decisions, evolution_history, or recent_reflections sections
ContextAssembler.assemble() with node_id='init' includes BOOT.md and constitution but not dao, evolution_history, recent_reflections
ContextAssembler.assemble() with node_id=None includes all sections (backward compatibility)
findings: Pre-existing test failure in tests/test_knowledge.py::TestSkillPathResolution::test_skill_paths_resolve (expects 28 skills but finds 29) - unrelated to this feature. All other 1093 tests pass. Coverage at 98.35%. The tiering changes required updating 3 existing test files (test_context_assembler_enhanced.py, test_feedback_loop.py, test_kernel.py) to use appropriate node IDs that include the sections being tested.
